summary: Plan-only inventory assessment for five independent open PRs. No merge action is recommended because the artifact does not contain complete merge preflight proof for any PR. #18860 has concrete failing proof/check repair work and gets a bounded repair artifact; the other PRs need maintainer or preflight follow-up before merge can be planned.

actions.reason: Merge candidate proof is incomplete even though checks are otherwise favorable; maintainer/preflight must run required Codex /review and confirm live mergeability before merge planning.
Concrete branch repair is needed before any merge recommendation: fix the failed proof and extension boundary checks, then rerun required validation and Codex /review.
Build a repair plan for the contributor branch instead of replacing or closing the PR.
The PR looks merge-proximate, but the required merge preflight is incomplete and the branch cannot be maintainer-repaired if review finds changes.
Do not merge until Codex bot suggestions are hydrated and either addressed or explicitly cleared, followed by required Codex /review merge preflight.
The PR appears strong, but required merge proof is incomplete; rerun live preflight with Codex /review and comment resolution before merge planning.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #18860 on the contributor branch so the new after_tools_resolved hook passes current proof and extension boundary checks before any merge recommendation.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repairs #18860 so the after_tools_resolved plugin hook passes current proof and extension boundary checks.

Source PR credit: @lan17, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/18860.

Validation plan:
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts src/plugins/wired-hooks-after-tools-resolved.test.ts
- npm run validate
- current Real behavior proof for #18860
- extension boundary checks: check-additional-extension-package-boundary, check-additional-extension-bundled, check-additional-extension-channels
- Codex /review with findings addressed or explicitly blocked
validation_commands: run current Real behavior proof for #18860
rerun extension boundary checks: check-additional-extension-package-boundary, check-additional-extension-bundled, check-additional-extension-channels
run Codex /review and address or explicitly block every finding
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for @lan17 as the source PR author.

Repair should stay on PR #18860 because maintainer_can_modify=true; if replacement later becomes necessary, the replacement PR body must credit https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/18860 and @lan17.
